title: TopSnip go-live: migration-v6 then merge
detail: Supabase SQL editor: run `supabase/migration-v6-review-remediation.sql`, THEN merge `codex/review-remediation` to main and push. `/api/feed` breaks if merged before the migration. Full runbook: `Projects/sessions/2026-07-08-optimization-sweep/LOG.md` iter 1. If you give Claude `SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN` (or run `supabase login`), it can run the whole go-live including live verification.
promptSeed: Run the TopSnip go-live. Preconditions: migration-v6 must be applied in Supabase BEFORE merging (I may need to give you SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN). Then: git checkout main, merge codex/review-remediation, push, and verify topsnip.co/feed live. Runbook is in Projects/sessions/2026-07-08-optimization-sweep/LOG.md iteration 1.

title: Back up ~/.tauri/vaani-updater.key off this machine
detail: Losing this key bricks Vaani auto-updates. Copy it to a password manager or USB. Only you can do this; Claude must not exfiltrate the key.
promptSeed: Walk me through backing up ~/.tauri/vaani-updater.key safely (password manager or USB), then verify the backup exists without printing the key contents.

title: Verify Primal Rescue deploy picked up the data-corruption fix
detail: The fix was merged to main and pushed on 2026-07-08. If the app is Vercel-linked it should have deployed automatically; verify against the live app, not the repo.
promptSeed: Verify that the deployed Primal Rescue app includes the data-corruption fix pushed to main on 2026-07-08. Find the live URL (check vercel.json / README / Vercel CLI), confirm the deployed build is newer than the fix commit, and exercise the fixed flow if possible.

title: Mindward: STRATZ token (Steam login), wire env vars
detail: Log in at stratz.com with Steam, get an API token, set `STRATZ_TOKEN` in Vercel env + `.env.local`. Unlocks live draft data for /draft.
promptSeed: I have a STRATZ token. Wire it into Mindward: set STRATZ_TOKEN in .env.local, add it to Vercel env for mindward-web, redeploy, and verify the /draft flow pulls live data.

title: career-ops: create private repo + push surya-local (has CV data)
detail: Branch `surya-local` holds the whole personal layer (auto-apply agent, CV, scanner) committed but with no remote. Contains CV data, so it needs your explicit sign-off: `gh repo create nikunjsurya/career-ops-personal --private` then push.
promptSeed: I approve backing up career-ops. Create the private repo nikunjsurya/career-ops-personal with gh, add it as remote 'mine', push the surya-local branch, and verify the push landed. Do not make the repo public.

title: Portfolio: Vercel import + domain (DEPLOYMENT.md steps 2-5)
detail: Repo nikunjsurya/portfolio is pushed and ready. Import it in Vercel, then sort the domain. Note: surya.dev currently answers 200 for someone else; check availability first.
promptSeed: Deploy the portfolio: walk DEPLOYMENT.md steps 2-5 with me. Use the Vercel tools/CLI where possible, check whether surya.dev is actually available (it answered 200 for someone on 2026-07-08), and propose fallback domains if not.

title: somyacreates: pick the redesign (cinematic-gallery vs aetherbloom-style)
detail: Both redesign branches are pushed. This is a taste call: look at both rendered, pick one, say one sentence about why (that sentence becomes taste memory). Then Claude merges the winner to main.
promptSeed: Run both somyacreates redesign branches locally (cinematic-gallery and aetherbloom-style), screenshot each, show me both side by side, collect my pick and my one-sentence reason, save it as taste memory, then merge the winner to main.

title: _templates: merge wiki-compiler branch to master
detail: 11 untracked skills (incl. nikunj-skill voice profile) were committed on the wiki-compiler branch during the sweep. Merge to master when ready; consider a private remote for backup.
promptSeed: In Projects/_templates, review the wiki-compiler branch commits, merge to master if clean, and propose (do not create without approval) a private GitHub repo for backup since this holds the voice profile.

title: Aetherbloom Margins: Supabase keys per GO-LIVE.md
detail: Phase 2 (The Margins public wall) is shipped and waiting on Supabase keys. Follow GO-LIVE.md in the aetherbloom repo.
promptSeed: I have the Supabase keys for Aetherbloom Margins. Follow GO-LIVE.md: wire the keys, deploy, and verify the public wall end-to-end including the keeper admin flow.

title: Rotate Telegram + Pexels keys (flagged in dotclaude sync)
detail: The dotclaude sync flagged Telegram and Pexels keys for rotation weeks ago. Rotate them at the providers, then update n8n credentials and any .env files that hold them.
promptSeed: I rotated the Telegram and Pexels keys. Find every place the old keys live (n8n credentials, .env files, scripts), update them to the new values I paste, and verify the affected workflows still run.
